channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Savannah Guthrie pleads for public’s help as search for her missing mother continues
item.description: Investigation in apparent abduction enters second week as deadline for purported ransom note demanding $6m looms Television host Savannah Guthrie issu...

item.title: Ghislaine Maxwell prepared to speak ‘unfiltered truth’ about Epstein if Trump grants clemency, lawyer says – live
item.description: Lawyer for Epstein associate says Trump and Clinton are ‘innocent of any wrongdoing’ and Maxwell ‘alone’ can explain why, in exchange for freedom Ghis...

item.title: Starmer tells Labour MPs he is ‘not prepared to walk away’ after call for him to resign – UK politics live
item.description: Prime minister addresses parliamentary Labour party amid Mandelson scandal fallout Scottish Labour leader Anas Sarwar calls on Keir Starmer to stand d...

item.title: Keir Starmer says he is ‘not prepared to walk away’ after call for resignation
item.description: PM survives day of high tension after Scots Labour leader Anas Sarwar urges him to step down amid Peter Mandelson row UK politics live – latest update...

item.title: Australian politics live: Minns defends police actions at protest in ‘impossible situation’; PM ‘devastated’ by scenes in Sydney and Melbourne
item.description: Fallout begins after tumultuous scenes during protests over Israeli president Isaac Herzog’s visit. Follow the latest news live Get our breaking news ...

item.title: Streeting's Mandelson messages reveal election fears and criticism of government
item.description: The health secretary says he is publishing the messages "after a weekend of smear and innuendo that I have something to hide".

item.title: 'Didn't want the season to end like this' - Grealish has surgery
item.description: Jack Grealish says he "didn't want the season to end like this" after confirming he has had surgery on a foot stress fracture.

item.title: Family of Hillsborough victims criticise 'hollow' police apology
item.description: Trevor and Jenni Hicks, whose daughters died at Hillsborough, want court records to be corrected.

item.title: King's 'profound concern' at Andrew claims as Palace says it is 'ready' to support police
item.description: Making his first intervention in the Epstein scandal, the King said he is ready to support the police in their inquiries.

item.title: Palestinians say new Israeli measures in West Bank amount to de facto annexation
item.description: The measures aim to increase Israeli control over the occupied West Bank in terms of property law, planning, licensing and enforcement.
